research_topic: Transformer attention mechanisms in computer vision
description: Test coverage breadth evaluation during exploration phase with diverse evidence findings

input_artifacts.content: Vision Transformer (ViT) applies standard transformer attention to image patches. Self-attention computes pairwise relationships between all 16x16 patches, enabling global receptive fields from the first layer. Reference: https://arxiv.org/abs/2010.11929 Dosovitskiy et al., 2020.

Swin Transformer introduces shifted window attention to reduce computational cost from O(n²) to O(n). Hierarchical feature maps enable dense prediction tasks like object detection and segmentation. Reference: https://arxiv.org/abs/2103.14030 Liu et al., 2021.

Cross-attention mechanisms in DETR directly predict object bounding boxes without anchor boxes or NMS post-processing. The decoder cross-attends to encoder features using learned object queries. Reference: https://arxiv.org/abs/2005.12872 Carion et al., 2020.

Research directions: 1) Efficient attention variants for high-resolution images 2) Hybrid CNN-Transformer architectures 3) Attention visualization and interpretability 4) Multi-scale attention for dense prediction
Gap analysis: Limited coverage of deformable attention mechanisms and their computational trade-offs compared to standard attention.
